initial_candidates.sql:
WITH batsman_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        m.season_id,
        p.player_id AS batsman_id,
        p.player_name AS batsman_name,
        SUM(bs.runs_scored) AS total_runs
    FROM match m
    JOIN player_match pm ON m.match_id = pm.match_id AND pm.role = 'batsman'
    JOIN player p ON pm.player_id = p.player_id
    JOIN ball_by_ball b ON m.match_id = b.match_id AND b.striker = p.player_id
    JOIN batsman_scored bs ON b.match_id = bs.match_id AND b.over_id = bs.over_id AND b.ball_id = bs.ball_id AND b.innings_no = bs.innings_no
    GROUP BY m.season_id, p.player_id, p.player_name
),
bowler_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        m.season_id,
        p.player_id AS bowler_id,
        p.player_name AS bowler_name,
        COUNT(w.player_out) AS total_wickets
    FROM match m
    JOIN player_match pm ON m.match_id = pm.match_id AND pm.role = 'bowler'
    JOIN player p ON pm.player_id = p.player_id
    JOIN ball_by_ball b ON m.match_id = b.match_id AND b.bowler = p.player_id
    JOIN wicket_taken w ON b.match_id = w.match_id AND b.over_id = w.over_id AND b.ball_id = w.ball_id AND b.innings_no = w.innings_no
    WHERE w.kind_out NOT IN ('run out', 'hit wicket', 'retired hurt')
    GROUP BY m.season_id, p.player_id, p.player_name
),
ranked_batsmen AS (
    SELECT 
        season_id,
        batsman_id,
        batsman_name,
        total_runs,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY season_id ORDER BY total_runs DESC, batsman_id ASC) AS batsman_rank
    FROM batsman_stats
),
ranked_bowlers AS (
    SELECT 
        season_id,
        bowler_id,
        bowler_name,
        total_wickets,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY season_id ORDER BY total_wickets DESC, bowler_id ASC) AS bowler_rank
    FROM bowler_stats
)
SELECT 
    rb.season_id,
    rb.batsman_name,
    rb.total_runs,
    rw.bowler_name,
    rw.total_wickets
FROM ranked_batsmen rb
JOIN ranked_bowlers rw ON rb.season_id = rw.season_id AND rb.batsman_rank = rw.bowler_rank
WHERE rb.batsman_rank <= 3
ORDER BY rb.season_id ASC, rb.batsman_rank ASC;

WITH batsman_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        m.season_id,
        p.player_id AS batsman_id,
        p.player_name AS batsman_name,
        SUM(bs.runs_scored) AS total_runs
    FROM match m
    JOIN player_match pm ON m.match_id = pm.match_id AND pm.role = 'Batsman'
    JOIN player p ON pm.player_id = p.player_id
    JOIN ball_by_ball bb ON m.match_id = bb.match_id AND bb.striker = p.player_id
    JOIN batsman_scored bs ON bb.match_id = bs.match_id AND bb.over_id = bs.over_id AND bb.ball_id = bs.ball_id AND bb.innings_no = bs.innings_no
    GROUP BY m.season_id, p.player_id, p.player_name
),
bowler_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        m.season_id,
        p.player_id AS bowler_id,
        p.player_name AS bowler_name,
        COUNT(wt.player_out) AS total_wickets
    FROM match m
    JOIN player_match pm ON m.match_id = pm.match_id AND pm.role = 'Bowler'
    JOIN player p ON pm.player_id = p.player_id
    JOIN ball_by_ball bb ON m.match_id = bb.match_id AND bb.bowler = p.player_id
    JOIN wicket_taken wt ON bb.match_id = wt.match_id AND bb.over_id = wt.over_id AND bb.ball_id = wt.ball_id AND bb.innings_no = wt.innings_no
    WHERE wt.kind_out NOT IN ('run out', 'hit wicket', 'retired hurt')
    GROUP BY m.season_id, p.player_id, p.player_name
),
batsman_ranks AS (
    SELECT 
        season_id,
        batsman_id,
        batsman_name,
        total_runs,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY season_id ORDER BY total_runs DESC, batsman_id ASC) AS batsman_rank
    FROM batsman_stats
),
bowler_ranks AS (
    SELECT 
        season_id,
        bowler_id,
        bowler_name,
        total_wickets,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY season_id ORDER BY total_wickets DESC, bowler_id ASC) AS bowler_rank
    FROM bowler_stats
)
SELECT 
    br.season_id,
    br.batsman_name,
    br.total_runs,
    wbr.bowler_name,
    wbr.total_wickets
FROM batsman_ranks br
JOIN bowler_ranks wbr ON br.season_id = wbr.season_id AND br.batsman_rank = wbr.bowler_rank
WHERE br.batsman_rank <= 3
ORDER BY br.season_id ASC, br.batsman_rank ASC;

WITH batsman_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        m.season_id,
        p.player_id AS batsman_id,
        p.player_name AS batsman_name,
        SUM(bs.runs_scored) AS total_runs
    FROM match m
    JOIN player_match pm ON m.match_id = pm.match_id AND pm.role = 'batsman'
    JOIN player p ON pm.player_id = p.player_id
    JOIN ball_by_ball bb ON m.match_id = bb.match_id AND bb.striker = p.player_id
    JOIN batsman_scored bs ON bb.match_id = bs.match_id AND bb.over_id = bs.over_id AND bb.ball_id = bs.ball_id AND bb.innings_no = bs.innings_no
    GROUP BY m.season_id, p.player_id, p.player_name
),
bowler_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        m.season_id,
        p.player_id AS bowler_id,
        p.player_name AS bowler_name,
        COUNT(w.player_out) AS total_wickets
    FROM match m
    JOIN player_match pm ON m.match_id = pm.match_id AND pm.role = 'bowler'
    JOIN player p ON pm.player_id = p.player_id
    JOIN ball_by_ball bb ON m.match_id = bb.match_id AND bb.bowler = p.player_id
    JOIN wicket_taken w ON bb.match_id = w.match_id AND bb.over_id = w.over_id AND bb.ball_id = w.ball_id AND bb.innings_no = w.innings_no
    WHERE w.kind_out NOT IN ('run out', 'hit wicket', 'retired hurt')
    GROUP BY m.season_id, p.player_id, p.player_name
),
ranked_batsmen AS (
    SELECT 
        season_id,
        batsman_id,
        batsman_name,
        total_runs,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY season_id ORDER BY total_runs DESC, batsman_id ASC) AS batsman_rank
    FROM batsman_stats
),
ranked_bowlers AS (
    SELECT 
        season_id,
        bowler_id,
        bowler_name,
        total_wickets,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY season_id ORDER BY total_wickets DESC, bowler_id ASC) AS bowler_rank
    FROM bowler_stats
),
top_batsmen AS (
    SELECT * FROM ranked_batsmen WHERE batsman_rank <= 3
),
top_bowlers AS (
    SELECT * FROM ranked_bowlers WHERE bowler_rank <= 3
)
SELECT 
    b.season_id,
    b.batsman_name,
    b.total_runs,
    w.bowler_name,
    w.total_wickets
FROM top_batsmen b
JOIN top_bowlers w ON b.season_id = w.season_id AND b.batsman_rank = w.bowler_rank
ORDER BY b.season_id ASC, b.batsman_rank ASC;

WITH batsman_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        m.season_id,
        p.player_id AS batsman_id,
        p.player_name AS batsman_name,
        SUM(bs.runs_scored) AS total_runs
    FROM match m
    JOIN player_match pm ON m.match_id = pm.match_id AND pm.role = 'Batsman'
    JOIN player p ON pm.player_id = p.player_id
    JOIN ball_by_ball bb ON m.match_id = bb.match_id AND bb.striker = p.player_id
    JOIN batsman_scored bs ON bb.match_id = bs.match_id 
        AND bb.over_id = bs.over_id 
        AND bb.ball_id = bs.ball_id 
        AND bb.innings_no = bs.innings_no
    GROUP BY m.season_id, p.player_id, p.player_name
),
bowler_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        m.season_id,
        p.player_id AS bowler_id,
        p.player_name AS bowler_name,
        COUNT(w.player_out) AS total_wickets
    FROM match m
    JOIN player_match pm ON m.match_id = pm.match_id AND pm.role = 'Bowler'
    JOIN player p ON pm.player_id = p.player_id
    JOIN ball_by_ball bb ON m.match_id = bb.match_id AND bb.bowler = p.player_id
    JOIN wicket_taken w ON bb.match_id = w.match_id 
        AND bb.over_id = w.over_id 
        AND bb.ball_id = w.ball_id 
        AND bb.innings_no = w.innings_no
    WHERE w.kind_out NOT IN ('run out', 'hit wicket', 'retired hurt')
    GROUP BY m.season_id, p.player_id, p.player_name
),
batsman_ranks AS (
    SELECT 
        season_id,
        batsman_id,
        batsman_name,
        total_runs,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY season_id ORDER BY total_runs DESC, batsman_id ASC) AS batsman_rank
    FROM batsman_stats
),
bowler_ranks AS (
    SELECT 
        season_id,
        bowler_id,
        bowler_name,
        total_wickets,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY season_id ORDER BY total_wickets DESC, bowler_id ASC) AS bowler_rank
    FROM bowler_stats
),
top_batsmen AS (
    SELECT season_id, batsman_id, batsman_name, total_runs, batsman_rank
    FROM batsman_ranks
    WHERE batsman_rank <= 3
),
top_bowlers AS (
    SELECT season_id, bowler_id, bowler_name, total_wickets, bowler_rank
    FROM bowler_ranks
    WHERE bowler_rank <= 3
)
SELECT 
    b.season_id,
    b.batsman_name,
    b.total_runs,
    w.bowler_name,
    w.total_wickets
FROM top_batsmen b
JOIN top_bowlers w 
    ON b.season_id = w.season_id 
    AND b.batsman_rank = w.bowler_rank
ORDER BY b.season_id ASC, b.batsman_rank ASC;

        p.player_id AS batsman_id,

    JOIN batsman_scored bs ON bb.match_id = bs.match_id AND bb.over_id = bs.over_id AND bb.ball_id = bs.ball_id AND bb.innings_no = bs.innings_no
    GROUP BY m.season_id, p.player_id, p.player_name

batsman_ranked AS (

        season_id,
        batsman_id,
        batsman_name,
        total_runs,

    SELECT
        m.season_id,
        p.player_id AS bowler_id,
        p.player_name AS bowler_name,
        COUNT(w.player_out) AS total_wickets
    FROM match m
    JOIN player_match pm ON m.match_id = pm.match_id AND pm.role = 'bowler'
    JOIN player p ON pm.player_id = p.player_id
    JOIN ball_by_ball bb ON m.match_id = bb.match_id AND bb.bowler = p.player_id
    JOIN wicket_taken w ON bb.match_id = w.match_id AND bb.over_id = w.over_id AND bb.ball_id = w.ball_id AND bb.innings_no = w.innings_no
    WHERE w.kind_out NOT IN ('run out', 'hit wicket', 'retired hurt')
    GROUP BY m.season_id, p.player_id, p.player_name
),
bowler_ranked AS (
    SELECT
        season_id,
        bowler_id,
        bowler_name,
        total_wickets,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY season_id ORDER BY total_wickets DESC, bowler_id ASC) AS bowler_rank
    FROM bowler_stats

top_batsmen AS (
    SELECT season_id, batsman_id, batsman_name, total_runs, batsman_rank
    FROM batsman_ranked
    WHERE batsman_rank <= 3
),
top_bowlers AS (
    SELECT season_id, bowler_id, bowler_name, total_wickets, bowler_rank
    FROM bowler_ranked
    WHERE bowler_rank <= 3
)
SELECT
    b.season_id,
    b.batsman_id,
    b.batsman_name,
    b.total_runs,
    w.bowler_id,
    w.bowler_name,
    w.total_wickets
FROM top_batsmen b
JOIN top_bowlers w ON b.season_id = w.season_id AND b.batsman_rank = w.bowler_rank
ORDER BY b.season_id ASC, b.batsman_rank ASC;
